# Packages whose changes justify rebuilding the installiso image.
NetworkManager
authselect
bash
ca-certificates
cockpit
cracklib
dbus
dnf5
dracut
glibc
grub
kbd
kexec-tools
libpwquality
linux
openresolv
openruyi-release
openruyi-repos
openruyi-systemd-default-preset
openssh
pam
procps
setup
shadow
sudo
system-user-root
systemd
util-linux
xfsprogs
